params.name: Snail Hero Saga
params.description: An ancient legendary tome chronicling the heroic deeds of the Snails. This book records the pivotal moments that shaped the destiny and heroes of the Snail species, who turned the tide in critical battles, protecting their fellow snails against all odds.
